prompt:
[capsule v1 refactor]
anchors: "async" | "await" | "next(err)"
target: loadUser
constraint: same_validation_order
error_path: "next(err)"
req: async_await; minimal behavioral change. Keep the same validation order and keep one place that maps database errors to `next(err)`.
code: function loadUser(id,next){if(!id)return next(new Error('missing_id'));db.findUser(id,function(err,user){if(err)return next(err);if(!user)return next(new Error('not_found'));audit.log(user.id,function(logErr){if(logErr)return next(logErr);cache.set(user.id,user,function(cacheErr){if(cacheErr)return next(cacheErr);next(null,user);});});});}
deliver: migration_plan_or_patch_sketch
